$comment: Slug → workflow metadata. The import script reads this for display names + tags; runtime wrappers in services/dify/workflows.ts use slug as the canonical id.

workflows.description: Asks new users 2-3 qualifying questions and seeds a starter workbench board with 3-5 relevant capabilities.
Conversational layer in front of static membership tier cards. Recommends discovery/briefing/console/platform based on stated needs.
Intent-parsing + reranking layer on top of the marketplace-listings KB. Replaces direct retrieve() in routes/marketplace-listings.ts.
Reviews seller submissions and produces a verdict (auto_approve | send_to_moderator | auto_reject) with risk flags + confidence. Runs in parallel to the manual moderation queue.
On KYC decline / AML hit / liveness failure, captures a structured appeal for the compliance reviewer. Does NOT override the decline.
On invoice.payment_failed, helps user pick a rescue path (update card / switch method / downgrade / pause / escalate). Runs in parallel to dunning email.
On reject-with-comment in routes/review.ts, generates revision prompts that fireDraftEnrichment uses for its retry.
Generic Perplexity → Sonnet synthesis flow. Replaces inline calls in enrichment/runners.ts + alpha/enrich.ts when DIFY_RESEARCH_ENABLED=1.
Daily cron-triggered workflow that pulls each agent's digest + Neo4j correlations + Mem0 patterns and produces a cross-agent strategic brief. Replaces services/synthesis-agent.ts once proven.
